setup.seed_note: Step 1 (failure_mode) uses seed 42 and Step 3 (strictness_curve) uses seed 0. The two steps are never compared against each other at a fixed seed, so this difference does not affect any reported result.

naming_note: Step 1 logs the honest metric as 'strict_accuracy'; it is the tiered last-number extractor (== last_number_acc), NOT the tag-only strict_tag extractor.

robust_findings: last_number-as-reward is worst by three of four instruments (lenient, last_number, judge — margin 0.12-0.14); strict_tag ruler exception expected (least faithful extractor, F1 0.473)
lenient over-credits its own model by 12 points; strict_tag is self-honest
preliminary_findings: strict_tag (0.480) vs lenient (0.460) top-flip = one completion at n=50; directional only
recall-convergence: strict_tag_acc rises to the flat last_number ceiling (~0.27); single-seed signal
